PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-05-2011 Continued To Jan-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Little for Paul Satterblom (Respondent/Objector). Deb Kinney for Mark Keeney and Julie Davis (Petitioners).

The matter was continued to January 19, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Little to have further discussion with his Client.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-27-2010 Continued To Dec-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Little for Paul Satterblom.

Mr. Little stated that they intend to contest the will, that he had not started drafting the contest and requested a 60 day continuance. The matter was continued to December 15, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Little is to contact opposing Counsel.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
